title: Overview
emptyState: No sessions scanned yet — run a rescan from Sessions and come back.

clock.title: Rhythm
clock.nightNote: Late nights (after 21:00) make up {{pct}}% — go easy on yourself.

cost.title: Estimated cost
cost.footnote: Unit prices from models.dev. Prefixed/suffixed model names are fuzzy-matched; unmatched ones count tokens only, no cost.

cost.title: {{repo}} spend is up
cost.body: {{repo}} cost {{cost}} in the last 7 days, {{pct}}% more than the week before — mostly in a few long sessions. Starting fresh sooner would save a chunk.

idle.title: {{repo}}
idle.body: Untouched for {{days}} days. Either pick it back up or clear its snapshots to free space.

pingpong.title: {{n}} round trips
pingpong.body: “{{title}}” bounced between tools {{n}} times — maybe neither side truly wrapped it up.

night.title: Night owl
night.body: {{pct}}% of sessions start late at night, peaking around {{hour}}:00. Nice momentum — but rest too.

weekend.title: A full weekend
weekend.body: Not a single session last weekend — a rare break. Hope you were out having fun.

streak.title: {{days}}-day streak
streak.body: {{days}} days of activity in a row now — that flow is worth keeping.

snapshot.title: {{title}}
snapshot.body: A {{days}}-day-old snapshot still holds {{gb}} GB. Clear it if you no longer need it.
